## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Manual steps, screenshots, command output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've signed off my commits with `-s` (Developer Certificate of Origin).
      See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-commits-dco).
- [ ] Backend changes: I ran `python -m compileall app` from `backend/`.
- [ ] Frontend changes: I ran `npx tsc -b --noEmit` from `frontend/`.
- [ ] If I changed a backend DTO, I updated the matching TypeScript types.
- [ ] I haven't committed any secrets, kubeconfigs, or local databases.
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation (README, in-app help text, etc.).

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual? Trade-offs you considered? Things you'd like a
     second opinion on? Leave blank if not relevant. -->
